! Thiran Thiran, our flagship inter college techno-cultural-sports fest was conducted on February 05-06 , featuring hackathons, workshops, tech and non tech challenges, cultural contests and celebrity performances! Dhrona Our annual intra-college fest was a vibrant celebration of talent and joy, featuring electrifying dances, captivating cultural showcases, sizzling band performances, and a lively shopping and food fest! Pongal Sri Eshwar Pongal Celebration 2025 was a joyful blend of tradition, cultural performances, and festive cheer, bringing smiles, togetherness, and excitement the Eshwarite way

! Thiran Thiran, our flagship inter college techno-cultural-sports fest was conducted on February 20-22 , featuring hackathons, workshops, tech and non tech challenges, cultural contests and celebrity performances! Dhrona Our annual intra-college fest was a vibrant celebration of talent and joy, featuring electrifying dances, captivating cultural showcases, sizzling band performances, and a lively shopping and food fest! Pongal Sri Eshwar Pongal Celebration 2025 was a joyful blend of tradition, cultural performances, and festive cheer, bringing smiles, togetherness, and excitement the Eshwarite way! . Diwali Sri Eshwar celebrated Diwali with joy, togetherness, and vibrant festivities, embracing the spirit of light and happiness! SLC Investiture The Student Leadership Council (SLC) at Sri Eshwar fosters leadership and teamwork, empowering students to organize events and create a vibrant campus life

. Freshwarite Freshwarite Celebration 2024-25, organized by the dynamic SLC Students of Sri Eshwar, promises unmatched energy, excitement, and fun with thrilling activities and entertainment for our freshers! Diwali Sri Eshwar celebrated Diwali with joy, togetherness, and vibrant festivities, embracing the spirit of light and happiness! Navratri Dandiya Sri Eshwar's Navaratri Celebration was a vibrant spectacle, featuring a colorful Mehndi Fest and an electrifying Dandiya Dance that brought everyone together in festive joy! Onam The Onam Festival Celebration 2024, organized by the Student Leadership Council, was a vibrant day of cultural programs, traditional games, and festive joy, making unforgettable memories! Women's Day Our wonderful Sri Eshwar Women deserve the best!

! Women's Day Our wonderful Sri Eshwar Women deserve the best!! Join for us a day filled with interacting with inspiring women leaders and participating in exciting contests and immersive shopping experience! Hostel Movie and DJ Night Hostel life at Sri Eshwar is all about great vibes and memories, with our hostellers enjoying a magical movie night under the stars with popcorn, cotton candy, and laughter! Hostel Trip The I-Year Boys' Hostel students are set for an exciting trip to Aaliyar Dam on March 9, 2025, promising a day of fun, bonding, and unforgettable memories

!
